description.initial: A stretch of open grassland at the edge of the western wilds. Wildflowers dot the hills. The tree line of the Enchanted Forest rises to the southeast.
description.return: The edge between the western wilderness and the lands of your journey. The forest lies to the south.
description.atmospheric: Wildflowers dot the grassland. Birds circle overhead, riding the warm air currents.

north.blockedMessage: The grassland fades into a featureless horizon. There is nothing beyond this point.
